chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S- 1170 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 10100/2025. 2. For orders on MA 10101/2025. 24.11.2025. Mr. Anand Kumar Khatri, Advocate for applicant / surety. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for State. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. Learned counsel submits that vide Order dated 26.09.2025 the applicant/accused was granted protective bail by this Court for a period of fifteen days and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. Thereafter, applicant / accused surrendered before the trial Court within stipulated period wherefrom he was granted interim pre- arrest bail, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned D.P.G, present in Court in some other matters, waives the notice and after going through the record, tendered his no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE Tufail
